query:
-- 删除索引
DROP INDEX idx_professors_major ON professors;
DROP INDEX idx_professors_uni_major ON professors;

-- 删除废弃字段
ALTER TABLE professors 
DROP COLUMN university_id,
DROP COLUMN email,
DROP COLUMN lab_name,
DROP COLUMN lab_website,
DROP COLUMN personal_website,
DROP COLUMN bio,
DROP COLUMN accepting_students,
DROP COLUMN major_name,
DROP COLUMN source_url;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute -- 删除索引
DROP INDEX idx_professors_major ON professors;
DROP INDEX idx_professors_uni_major ON professors;

-- 删除废弃字段
ALTER TABLE professors 
DROP COLUMN university_id,
DROP COLUMN email,
DROP COLUMN lab_name,
DROP COLUMN lab_website,
DROP COLUMN personal_website,
DROP COLUMN bio,
DROP COLUMN accepting_students,
DROP COLUMN major_name,
DROP COLUMN source_url;
